description: Italian Canadian crime family based in Montreal, Quebec, founded in the 1970s by Nicolo Rizzuto. It overtook the Cotroni crime family to become the preeminent Mafia organization in Montreal. The family is involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, illegal gambling, and murder. It is considered by the FBI as a faction of the Bonanno crime family, but recognized as independent by Canadian authorities.

country_links.evidence_quote: Sivabavanandan was arrested while on visit to France and extradited to Italy, where he was convicted of Mafia associations...
country_links.context: A Rizzuto family associate was arrested while visiting France and extradited to Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: Colonel Paolo La Forgia in a press conference in Rome stated the construction firm of Zappia International which had been bidding for the rights to build a bridge over the Strait of Messina was a front for the Rizzuto family, who had plans to launder billions.
country_links.context: The Rizzuto family planned to launder money through a construction firm bidding for a bridge project in Italy, and had members extradited there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Moreno 'The Turkey' Gallo, a once-influential member of the crime family, was killed by a gunman inside an Italian restaurant in the Mexican city of Acapulco.
country_links.context: A Rizzuto family member was killed in Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: Italy had also filed an extradition request with the United Kingdom for Sivalingam Sivabavanandan
country_links.context: Italy filed an extradition request with the United Kingdom for a Rizzuto associate.

country_links.evidence_quote: The United States Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) considers the family a faction of the Bonanno crime family of New York City
country_links.context: The Rizzuto family is considered a faction of the Bonanno crime family in New York City and Vito Rizzuto was extradited there for murder.

country_links.evidence_quote: most of the Rizzuto family fled to Venezuela
country_links.context: The Rizzuto family fled to Venezuela and had major business holdings there.
